partitions.selection_rule: Assign genes into train using a deterministic gene_id hash keyed by split_seed after the ranking-input freeze is fixed.
partitions.leakage_rule: Train rows may consume only the frozen pre-cutoff ranking-input dataset and must not join post-cutoff evaluation labels.

partitions.selection_rule: Assign the validation partition with the same deterministic hash after the train allocation is fixed.
partitions.leakage_rule: Validation rows may tune rescue-task hyperparameters but must not expose held-out evaluation labels outside the validation partition.

partitions.selection_rule: Assign the remaining genes to the held-out test partition from the frozen ranking-input dataset.
partitions.leakage_rule: Test rows remain fully held out until scoring time and must never leak into feature construction or threshold selection.

description: Active deterministic split manifest for the frozen glutamatergic convergence rescue ranking inputs.
notes: The split contract exists so PR-43 can respect a frozen assignment policy without reopening the raw rescue or atlas data lanes.
